sections.paragraph:
(“streets,” or according to Gen 26:22, “wide spaces”), [Rehoboth], pr.n.-

(1) of a well, ib.-(2) רְהֹבֹות עִיר (“thestreets of the city,” comp. Platææ, a city in Bœotia) a city of Assyria, Gen 10:11, of which nothing certain is known. See J. D. Michaëlis, Spicileg., tom. i. p. 240-44-(3) רְחֹובֹות הַנָּהָר (“breadths of the river,” i.e. Euphrates?) a city, apparently situated on the Euphrates, perhaps رحبة between Cercusium and Ana, Gen 36:37.
